# Lua Helena Moon — Human–AI Context Architecture

Lua Helena Moon Martins Cardoso is a hospital psychologist, trained sociologist, and Human–AI Context Architect based in Limeira/SP, Brazil. She works with AI literacy, AI adoption, knowledge governance, living documentation, responsible AI, People Analytics, and human-centered context architecture.

## Canonical professional page

- https://www.luahelena.com.br/ia/
  - Professional presentation of Lua Helena Moon's work in Human–AI Context Architecture.
  - Available in Portuguese and English through the language toggle and `?lang=en`.
  - Best used to understand her profile, interests, work surface, and possible fit for remote AI-related opportunities.

## Key concepts

- Human–AI Context Architecture
- AI literacy
- AI adoption
- Knowledge governance
- Living documentation
- Context handoffs
- Source profiles
- Responsible AI
- People Analytics
- Human–system translation
- Company brain
- Context before tooling

## What this work is

A practice focused on structuring the context AI systems need in order to become useful in real projects: who uses the system, for what purpose, with which memory, which boundaries, which language, which documents, and which human review criteria.

## What this work is not

- Not machine learning engineering
- Not data science
- Not full-stack engineering
- Not generic prompt engineering
- Not chatbot branding
- Not hidden SEO manipulation
